LandingInfo.trustedBy: Trusted by software engineers at top companies
LandingInfo.howItWorksTitle: Deep Dive: How our ATS AI Works
LandingInfo.howItWorksSubtitle: Our system reverse-engineers ATS (Applicant Tracking Systems) to ensure your CV passes the automated resume screeners.
LandingInfo.step1Desc: We parse your CV and extract every skill, metric, and responsibility perfectly.
LandingInfo.step2Desc: Google's Gemini AI compares your profile against the precise job description.
LandingInfo.step3Desc: We provide missing keywords and generate a flawless native-language cover letter.
LandingInfo.useCasesSubtitle: Whether you're breaking into tech or aiming for staff engineer.
LandingInfo.juniorDesc: Highlight transferable skills and optimize academic projects to match your first entry-level requirements.
LandingInfo.midDesc: Focus on metrics, impact, and scaling. Find the missing keywords holding you back from senior roles.
LandingInfo.seniorDesc: Translate complex architectural achievements into the exact business language ATS systems look for.
LandingInfo.faq1A: An Applicant Tracking System (ATS) is software that employers use to manage the recruiting process. They often automatically parse and filter CVs before a human ever sees them.
LandingInfo.faq2Q: Why is my CV being rejected?
LandingInfo.faq2A: Many highly-qualified engineers are rejected because their CV lacks the EXACT keywords from the job description, or the formatting confused the ATS parser.
LandingInfo.faq3Q: Is the cover letter generated by AI good enough?
LandingInfo.faq3A: Yes. By using advanced LLMs and providing the exact context of your CV and the job description, the generated cover letter is highly tailored and indistinguishable from a carefully crafted manual letter.
LandingInfo.bottomCtaSubtitle: Start mapping your CV for free.
